codeReview.summary: Implementation is correct and complete. WorkerBootState enum with 5 states (Spawning, TrustRequired, ReadyForPrompt, Running, Finished) is properly implemented. State transitions are strictly enforced. Prompt submission correctly rejects in Spawning, TrustRequired, and Finished states with WorkerBootError::PromptRejectedWhileNotReady. 20 tests all pass. Clippy clean.

issues.description: WorkerBootError::AlreadyFinished and WorkerBootError::WorkerNotFound variants are defined but never used in the implementation. These are dead code variants.

Handoff verification.commandsRun[0] shows test command 'cargo test -p swell-orchestrator --test worker_boot_lifecycle' but this test target doesn't exist. The correct command is 'cargo test -p swell-orchestrator worker_boot'. This is a documentation discrepancy but tests did run correctly.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. Worker boot state machine with 5 typed states is correctly implemented. Prompts are rejected in Spawning, TrustRequired, and Finished states with clear errors. All 20 tests pass. Only minor issue: two unused error variants (AlreadyFinished, WorkerNotFound) are dead code.
